action_set_definitions.name: get_permissions
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current user's access level to determine if they can view sensitive documents or modify logs.

action_set_definitions.name: list_documents
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata for all documents in the data room, used to identify contract IDs and titles.

action_set_definitions.name: get_review_checklist
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current completion status of the due diligence checklist categories.

action_set_definitions.name: open_document
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the active_document_id to the specified document to allow for content searching.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the document to open.

action_set_definitions.name: search_document_content
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the currently active document for specific keywords or clauses.

keywords.description: Keywords to search for, e.g., ['Force Majeure', 'Allocation'].

matches.excerpt: In the event of Force Majeure, ChipCo reserves the right to allocate...

action_set_definitions.name: log_risk
action_set_definitions.description: Logs an identified risk into the environment state, including severity and description.

document_id.description: ID of the document associated with the risk.

risk_type.description: The name of the risk (e.g., 'Supply Gap Risk').

description.description: Detailed explanation of why this is a risk based on the clause analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: update_checklist_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the completion status of a specific category in the review checklist.

state_description.documents_metadata: A list of objects containing metadata for all contracts in the data room (ID, title, type, status).
state_description.review_checklist: Mapping of specific due diligence requirements to their completion status (e.g., 'Change of Control' -> 'Pending').
state_description.identified_risks: A log of risks flagged by the Agent, including document references and severity levels.
state_description.active_document_id: The ID of the document currently 'open' or in the Agent's focus.
